title: Camps * Muscular Dystrophy - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Camps * Muscular Dystrophy 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community AIDS/HIV Autism Spectrum Disorder Disabilities Issues Families/Friends of People With Cancer Former Foster Children Foster Children Muscular Dystrophy Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MUSCULAR DYSTROPHY ASSOCIATION MDA RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one support and information about muscular dystrophy, Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS), and related neuromuscular diseases, including clinical trials, care centers, programs, research and advocacy, summer camps, volunteer opportunities and community referrals. 1016 W Jackson Boulevard #1073 Chicago, IL 60607 Eligibility: Must have a diagnosis of one of the 43 neuromuscular diseases covered. Includes Myasthenia Gravis, Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy (DMD), Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS), and Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA). Summer camps: Ages 8-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-3pm Email (833) 275-6321 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
